_comment: Smart money wallets sourced via on-chain analysis: DexScreener top-volume Solana pairs (WIF, BONK, JUP, JitoSOL) -> Helius parsed SWAP transactions -> wallets with 50+ swaps active within 7 days. No Birdeye API key available; validated via Helius enhanced transaction API. Win-rate is approximated by high swap frequency across multiple DEXes — true PnL win_rate requires per-tx balance delta computation (Phase 2).

wallets.label: SM_1
wallets.notes: DROPPED 2026-02-22: High noise, single-wallet self-convergence. TITAN + JUPITER routing - likely MEV-aware or algorithmic trader.

wallets.label: SM_2
wallets.notes: DROPPED 2026-02-22: High noise, high-frequency with low signal quality. 97 swaps in sampled window.

wallets.label: SM_3
wallets.notes: RAYDIUM + ORCA cross-DEX activity — swing trader or arb bot. Multi-venue presence is strong signal.

wallets.label: SM_4
wallets.notes: 91 swaps in sample, active across multiple top-volume pairs.

wallets.label: SM_5
wallets.notes: 87 swaps in sample window.

wallets.label: SM_6
wallets.notes: 72/78 swaps via TITAN — likely a TITAN-integrated bot or algorithmic trader.

wallets.label: SM_7
wallets.notes: 70 swaps in sample window, recently active.

wallets.label: SM_8
wallets.notes: OKX_DEX_ROUTER + PUMP_AMM + PUMP_FUN + JUPITER — classic meme coin hunter using pump.fun early entries.

wallets.label: SM_9
wallets.notes: 66 swaps in sample window.

wallets.label: SM_10
wallets.notes: ORCA + RAYDIUM + METEORA DAMM V2 — multi-DEX trader, broader strategy range.

wallets.label: SM_11
wallets.notes: DROPPED 2026-03-13: Confirmed LP/bot position via on-chain analysis. Amount always 0 SOL. Not a directional trader.

wallets.notes: DROPPED 2026-03-13: Confirmed LP/bot position. Same LP token discovery pool as SM_11/SM_13-20.

sourcing_method: DexScreener top-volume pairs (WIF/SOL, BONK/SOL, JUP/SOL, JitoSOL/SOL) → Helius parsed SWAP txns (262 total) → wallet frequency ranking → top 20 candidates → individual Helius SWAP history validation → filter swap_count>=50 AND last_active within 7 days
birdeye_note: No BIRDEYE_API_KEY configured. True win_rate > 0.60 validation requires Birdeye PnL endpoint or manual per-tx balance delta computation. Phase 2 improvement: add BIRDEYE_API_KEY to ~/otto/projects/alpha/.env and re-screen.
